name: Barbell Bench Press
description: Lie on a flat bench, grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to chest and press up.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
description: Press a barbell upward from an incline bench to target the upper chest.

name: Dumbbell Fly
description: Lie on a flat bench with dumbbells, open arms wide in an arc then squeeze back together.

name: Push-Up
description: From a plank position, lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor, then push back up.

name: Cable Crossover
description: Stand between cable machines, pull handles down and together in a hugging motion.

name: Barbell Deadlift
description: Hinge at the hips to grip a loaded barbell on the floor, then stand up by driving through the legs and hips.

name: Pull-Up
description: Hang from a bar with an overhand grip and pull yourself up until your chin clears the bar.

name: Bent-Over Barbell Row
description: Bend forward at the hips, pull the barbell toward your lower chest while keeping your back flat.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Sit at a lat pulldown machine and pull the bar down to your upper chest.

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Sit upright, pull the cable handle toward your torso while squeezing your shoulder blades together.

name: Barbell Squat
description: Place the barbell on your upper back, squat down until thighs are parallel, then stand back up.

name: Leg Press
description: Sit in the leg press machine and push the platform away by extending your knees and hips.

name: Leg Extension
description: Sit on the machine and extend your legs to straighten the knees against resistance.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Step forward into a lunge, lower your back knee toward the ground, then step forward with the other leg.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hold a barbell at hip height, hinge forward at the hips while keeping legs nearly straight.

name: Lying Leg Curl
description: Lie face down on the leg curl machine and curl your heels toward your glutes.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Lie on your back with knees bent, drive your hips up by squeezing your glutes.

name: Hip Thrust
description: Sit with your upper back against a bench, roll a barbell over your hips, and thrust upward.

name: Standing Calf Raise
description: Stand on the calf raise machine and push up onto the balls of your feet.

name: Seated Calf Raise
description: Sit on the calf raise machine with pads on your thighs and raise your heels.

name: Overhead Press
description: Stand and press a barbell from shoulder height to overhead until arms are fully extended.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides, raise them out to shoulder height with a slight bend in the elbows.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
description: Sit or stand, press dumbbells from shoulder height to overhead.

name: Face Pull
description: Pull a rope attachment toward your face at eye level, separating the ends and squeezing rear delts.

name: Reverse Fly
description: Bend forward and raise dumbbells out to the sides to target the rear deltoids.

name: Barbell Curl
description: Stand and curl a barbell upward by bending at the elbows, keeping upper arms stationary.

name: Dumbbell Curl
description: Stand holding dumbbells, curl them up by bending at the elbows.

name: Hammer Curl
description: Curl dumbbells with a neutral (palms facing each other) grip to target the brachialis.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Sit on a bench, brace your elbow against your inner thigh, and curl a dumbbell upward.

name: Tricep Pushdown
description: Stand at a cable machine and push the bar down by extending your elbows.

name: Skull Crusher
description: Lie on a bench, lower the barbell toward your forehead by bending at the elbows, then extend back up.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
description: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands and lower it behind your head, then extend back up.

name: Dip
description: Support yourself on parallel bars, lower your body by bending the elbows, then press back up.

name: Crunch
description: Lie on your back with knees bent, curl your shoulders off the floor by contracting your abs.

name: Plank
description: Hold a push-up position on your forearms, keeping your body in a straight line.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hang from a bar and raise your legs until they are parallel to the floor.

name: Cable Woodchop
description: Stand sideways to a cable machine and rotate your torso diagonally across your body.

name: Russian Twist
description: Sit with knees bent and feet off the floor, rotate your torso side to side.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
description: Hold dumbbells at your sides and shrug your shoulders up toward your ears.

name: Wrist Curl
description: Rest your forearms on a bench with palms up, curl the barbell by flexing your wrists.

name: Farmer's Walk
description: Hold heavy dumbbells at your sides and walk for distance or time.
